calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On April 14, 2003
Off Calendar Apr-14-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: P. Dias/Sajja R., Reporter: Adonis Duffy. Velvet Ann Chang, Esq. represented Cross Complainant, Greater Alameda Foreclosure Investments, LLC. Dominic Leung, Property Manager was sworn and examined. The Court notes that default was entered as to Cross Defendant, Lai Young Choi on December 20, 2003. The Court receives evidence and orders Quiet Title as to the subject real property located at 1930 Mission Street, #1 - San Francisco, CA. Order signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2003 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-26-2002 Set For Order To Show Cause On Feb-18-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Hearing On Order For Cimarron Service Corporation To Show Cause And For Preliminary Injuction
Off Calendar Sep-23-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- Hearing on order for Cimarron Service Corp. to show cause and for preliminary injunction is O F F C A L E N D A R -- no proof of service and no moving papers filed after court denied temporary restraining order setting hearing on order to show cause on September 9, 2002. (JJM/301) Court Reporter Eric Throne, CSR 7855
